subcodes.first_line: To the steadfast in the Covenant: The letter hath been received and perused, and from the meadows of inner meanings a perfumed breeze hath wafted [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای ثابت بر پیمان نامه رسید و ملاحظه گردید و از ریاض معانی نسیم معطری وزید
subcodes.subjects: @predictions and prophecies, @call to action, @firmness in the Covenant, @constitutional revolution in Iran, @teaching the Cause; call to teach
